localization.name: Burning Scythe
localization.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. 750% damage instead if 4 or more units on the battlefield are burning. 1000% damage instead if all units on the battlefield are burning.

Then the user and another random ally are granted Piercing. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

localization.name: Serpent's Inferno
localization.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy. 1200% damage instead if they are a Guardian.

If the user is burning, the user will immediately get the next turn.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.
localization.selected: 800%+ damage, may immediately get next turn

localization.name: Basilisk's Stare
localization.description:
Burns all enemy units on the battlefield, and grants each of them a Burn Shield. The user is granted the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then all burning enemies have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU.

Unlocked the first time an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield, and is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.
localization.selected:
Burns Units, may Disable
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Serpent's Bite
localization.description:
A random non-boss, non-Ephemeral, enemy on the battlefield that has their Active Skills disabled will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Himoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield).

Unlocked each time the user uses Basilisk's Stare, and is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable 5 times per battle.
localization.selected: May immediately defeat enemy, pulls user back

localization.name: Basilisk's Trap
localization.description:
This unit has Stun immunity.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield during an enemy turn.

This unit's attacks ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

This unit enters battle with a Burn Shield, and Mega Healing Burn for 100TU.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- all other units on the battlefield are granted Burn, and Burn Shields
- then all other allies to have their current TU reduced to 0.

Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

localization.name: Wrangler of Wraiths
localization.description:
The first time this unit is damaged by an enemy attack while burning, all enemies on the battlefield have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU. Whenever this unit leaves the battlefield, this effect is reset so it can trigger again.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit gains 20% damage reduction from attacks for each burning ally on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

This unit will gain a Charge at the end of each enemy turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges.  A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

Whenever an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source all allies on the battlefield become Enraged. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

At the end of this unit's turn, if this unit is:
- burning, this unit will weaken all enemies on the battlefield.
- sleeping or poisoned, this unit will grant all allies on the battlefield the burn status effect.
Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
